name: Can't Get Enough Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 1 Envelope Lipton Recipe Soup Mix - Savory Herb with Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tips off the chicken wings and save them for soup.
2. Cut each wing in half at the joint.
3. Deep fry, bake, or broil until golden brown and crunchy.
4. In a medium bowl, blend together the melted margarine, Lipton Recipe Soup Mix - Savory Herb with Garlic, and cayenne pepper sauce.
5. Add more or less cayenne pepper to match your desired "hot & spicy tolerance level."
6. Add the chicken wings; toss until fully coated in the mixture.
7. Serve over greens with cut-up celery, if desired. Makes 24 appetizers.
